snippets.description: Named side-effect stubs creditStarsForOrder/notifyCustomer (STAR-001/PUSH-002 TODO) and zod patchOrderBodySchema
Branch isolation enforcement: resolveBranchScope → null → 403; order.branch_id !== branchId → 403. Server never trusts client-supplied branch_id.
GET /orders/completed registered BEFORE GET /orders/:orderId — prevents Express route-ordering trap where 'completed' would be captured as an orderId param
Pure lookup-table state machine: TRANSITIONS Record + canTransition + isTerminal. No DB dependency, no client input trusted for transition legality.
Hermetic integration test proving cross-branch 403: branch-1 staff cannot PATCH a branch-2 order. Also verifies order was NOT mutated in DB.
